properties.name: @type
properties.docs: The type of the serialized message.

type_:GoogleProtobufAny.docs: Contains an arbitrary serialized message along with a @type that describes the type of the serialized message.

properties.name: code
properties.docs: The status code, which should be an enum value of [google.rpc.Code][google.rpc.Code].

properties.name: message
properties.docs: A developer-facing error message, which should be in English. Any user-facing error message should be localized and sent in the [google.rpc.Status.details][google.rpc.Status.details] field, or localized by the client.

properties.name: details
properties.docs: A list of messages that carry the error details.  There is a common set of message types for APIs to use.

type_:GoogleRpcStatus.docs: The `Status` type defines a logical error model that is suitable for different programming environments, including REST APIs and RPC APIs. It is used by [gRPC](https://github.com/grpc). Each `Status` message contains three pieces of data: error code, error message, and error details. You can find out more about this error model and how to work with it in the [API Design Guide](https://cloud.google.com/apis/design/errors).

properties.name: mode
properties.docs: Force the model to perform in a given mode.

properties.name: function_name
properties.docs: Force the model to call a particular function.

properties.name: name
properties.docs: The name of the resource to create.

properties.name: url
properties.docs: A URL to fetch the resource from.

properties.name: content
properties.docs: Tests bytes field mapping (string <-> ByteString conversion).
